title: Structures, Unions, Tagged Variants, and Flexible Arrays · Invariant Recall
summary: After a delay, a release reviewer reconstructs the tagged packet representation contract from partial traces, compares two near-miss implementations, and retrieves prior bounds and lifetime rules before feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for tagged packet representation after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Initialize, copy, compare, and validate structures by members and invariants rather than raw-byte assumptions.
Pair a union with an explicit discriminant and access only the active, validated member.
Allocate flexible-array objects with checked header-plus-elements arithmetic and record their element count.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
